calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-14-2006 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ. Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Nici Rodich.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
Order waiving live testimony is in file.
After hearing the evidence presented and considering of the filed declaration in support of default judgment by Plaintiff's V.P., Ernest Knowles, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Phillip Perry's Paint & Body Shop, Inc.; and Phillip Perry as follows:
Principal $26,566.46
Prejudgment Interest $647.92
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $435.00, for a total of $30,149.38
Plaintiff is entitled to the immediate possession of the leased equipments listed in the Judgment, see scanned doc. for details.
Judgment signed in open court.
